updates.title: JasonOS Prime / ScarFLIX Update - 2026-06-07 08:12
updates.detail: The dashboard `Recent achievements` panel was stale even though the main dashboard/status JSON was current. Cause: `D:\PlexTools\public\latest\scarflix_v2\jasonos_prime_recent_updates.json` was frozen at `2026-06-06T10:55:00Z`. `JasonOS_Prime_OutcomeDashboard.js` returned that stored file unchanged whenever it existed.
